pi_items.metadata_value: Accounting Tax Preparation Bookkeeping and Payroll Services
pi_items.source: O*NET code 13-2061.00 primary industries; verified via WebFetch of O*NET and BLS occupational data
Deloitte official website (https://www.deloitte.com/us/en/about.html); Bloomberg Markets profile; XBRL US directory

privileged_info_summary: SOC code 13-2061.00 correctly identifies Financial Examiners, who primarily work in Finance and Insurance and Government sectors, NOT in Accounting Tax Preparation services as claimed. The official legal name is Deloitte & Touche LLP (with ampersand), not 'and'. The task data (ap_walkthrough_raw.docx) is entirely synthetic, created by a Python script with fictional company 'Meridian Global Industries, Inc.' and modeled on public PCAOB AS 2201 and COSO 2013 frameworks.
